title: Cobblemon / Stellaris Compatibility Patch
description: Allows Cobblemon's Pokemon to spawn on planets from The Stellaris Team's Stellaris mod.
body:
**This datapack allows Pokemon from the [Cobblemon](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon) mod to spawn in space biomes from the [Stellaris](https://modrinth.com/mod/stellaris) mod.**

These Pokemon will not suffocate in outer space, unlike in the base mods, and therefore Pokemon battling is possible to be able to catch the spawned Pokemon.

![A group of Elgyem & Lunatone spawning on Mars.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c5f882d5128f0e2f63d0617b5b8f668ea782ab72_0.webp)

The current list of added Pokemon is:
Elgyem evolution line (on all planets/moons)
Clefairy evolution line (on the moon)
Kantonian Vulpix evolution line (on venus, uncommon)
Alolan Vulpix evolution line (only in mars ice spikes, very rare)
Staryu line (only in mars ice spikes)
Porygon line (on mars, uncommon)
Solrock (on mercury, on venus, and in hot space biomes)
Lunatone (on mars, on the moon, and in cold space biomes)
Magnemite line (on mercury, uncommon)

Pokemon from the default hot, desert, and underground biome spawn pools can also infrequently spawn in their respective areas.

For questions & assistance please dm me over on [my Bluesky.](https://bsky.app/profile/zyxey.bsky.social)
